Package de.uka.ilkd.key.speclang.jml.translation

Class ProgramVariableCollection

java.lang.Object
de.uka.ilkd.key.speclang.jml.translation.ProgramVariableCollection
public class ProgramVariableCollection extends Object
A collection of all program variables needed to translate a textual JML specification case. Used in JMLSpecFactory.

  • Field Summary

    Fields
    Modifier and Type
    Field
    Description
    Map<LocationVariable,Term>
    atBefores
    A map from every variable var to \before(var) (if applicable).

      public ProgramVariableCollection(ProgramVariable selfVar, ImmutableList<ProgramVariable> paramVars, ProgramVariable resultVar, ProgramVariable excVar, Map<LocationVariable,LocationVariable> atPreVars, Map<LocationVariable,Term> atPres)

      atPreVars - a map from every variable var to \old(var).
